name: galina-article
description: Write thought-leadership articles in Galina Antova's voice (data-driven, first-person, prescriptive/argued), then auto-run the galina-voice-editor agent to check the draft against her voice before saving. Includes a threat-brief-article skill that turns the daily devsecopsdadattack.com threat intelligence brief into a Galina-voice article. Bundles reference samples and a seeded voice profile.
